text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the last day of summer camp. Vodka is
staring out at the ocean by herself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, hey. Is it already time for the bus to
leave?
choice_data_list: We still have a little time. What's wrong?
We still have a little time. What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nothin'. I was just reflectin' on our time at camp. I
got in a lot better training than I expected to.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
On the beach, in the mountains, even on uneven
ground... I really improved my sprinting a bunch.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I usually don't have the patience Scarlet does, so
I didn't expect to get this far.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, I never got tired of training.
Something kept pushing me on.
choice_data_list:
Maybe it was the sense that you're getting
cooler.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The sense that I'm... Y'know what, you might be
right.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The whole time, I was thinking that I'd be cooler if
I could just improve my acceleration.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hah, but it turns out that's no big deal. Doin' your
best isn't about forcin' yourself...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's finding something you wanna try for. I think
doin' that might be enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stand side by side and look up at the evening
summer sky together.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I found it now, too, Scarlet. Something to be
proud of.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All that's left is to take on number one... You.
